# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow for our Python application CI/CD. Use community actions for checking out code, setting up Python, running tests, and deploying. Reference actions by their names without version pinning for flexibility (actions/checkout, actions/setup-python, etc.). We want to automatically get the latest versions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI/CD pipeline

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build and test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v2

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          python -m pip install pytest

      - name: Test
        run: |
          python -m pytest --cov=.

  deploy:
    name: Deploy
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/setup-python@v2

      - name: Install deployment dependencies
        run: python -m pip install --upgrade pip deployment_dependencies

      - name: Deploy
        run: |
          python -m deployment
